ham.subject: Upcoming Company‑Wide Security Awareness Training – March 12
ham.body:
Dear Team,

As part of our commitment to keep our workplace secure, we are holding a mandatory security awareness training session on March 12 from 11:00 AM to 12:30 PM in the main conference hall. The session will cover phishing best practices, password hygiene, and how to spot suspicious emails.

Please confirm your attendance by clicking the link below:
<URL>

Thank you for your participation.

Best regards,
IT Security Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Security Breach Requires Immediate Action
spam.body:
Dear Valued User,

Our monitoring systems have detected an unauthorized login attempt to your corporate network from an external IP address. Immediate action is required to prevent potential data compromise.

To verify your identity and secure your account, please complete the verification process within the next 30 minutes. Failure to do so will result in temporary suspension of your network access.

Begin verification now:
<URL>

Thank you for your prompt cooperation.

Sincerely,
Global Security Team
